description: A plain candid color photograph with no on-image text or graphic design. It depicts a man in a dark navy suit, seen from the side/behind, leaning forward to place or adjust a red carnation at the center of a large memorial wreath. The wreath is decorated with white and blue flowers forming a pattern (with a cluster of red flowers in the middle) and is mounted on a wooden easel/stand on an outdoor stage; a blue-draped table and a large video screen showing the same scene are visible behind him, with green trees in the background. The setting is a formal wreath-laying memorial ceremony (consistent with a Peace Officers / fallen-officers style commemoration). This is a documentary event photo, not a designed meme/poster, so is_designed=false. The tweet text is only a blue heart and U.S. flag emoji. OCR text is detector noise.
